# MACC Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-02-28

## Active Technologies
- SQLite via SQLAlchemy async (aiosqlite driver) (001-macc-modelling)
- Python 3.11+ (backend), TypeScript 5.x (frontend) + FastAPI, Pydantic, SQLAlchemy (async), React 18+, D3.js selective imports (charting), TanStack Query (data fetching), OpenAI SDK (AI suggestions) (001-macc-modelling)
- TypeScript 5.6 / React 18.3 / Vite 5.4 + react-router-dom 6.26, @tanstack/react-query 5.59, d3-scale/d3-array, @ecoonline/prism-web-components-react (to be installed) (003-prism-frontend-redesign)
- N/A (frontend-only; existing REST API to backend SQLite) (003-prism-frontend-redesign)

- Python 3.11+ (backend), TypeScript 5.x (frontend) + FastAPI, Pydantic, SQLAlchemy (async), React 18+, Recharts (charting), TanStack Query (data fetching), OpenAI SDK (AI suggestions) (001-macc-modelling)
